title: In The Heart Of The Pale Garden
body:
> ﻿I like the concept of Creaking itself, but it always lacked something...﻿

This resource pack replaces the Creaking model with a new deer-like creature inspired by the Leshen from The Witcher 3, that we can encountered, for example, in the quest "In The Heart Of The Woods". While the model is redesigned, it retains the original color palette and theme of the mob. Additionally, the pack modifies the texture of Spawn Egg and Chiseled Resin Bricks.


Now you can face the newly reborn Creaking on your next journey to the Pale Garden!
Good luck on the path.

**_Java players_** - OptiFine or EMF & ETF will be required!

Contact: https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/wh33zy
